name: oncocite
description: OncoCITE — multi-agent CIViC evidence extraction from scientific literature. Reads a publication PDF, plans an extraction strategy, extracts clinical genomic evidence items with verbatim source grounding, iteratively refines them, and normalizes entities to standardized ontologies (Entrez / DOID / RxNorm / NCIt / EFO / HPO / ClinVar / HGVS). Produces a 45-field JSON record per evidence item suitable for CIViC import.

paper.title: OncoCITE: Multimodal Multi-Agent Reconstruction of Clinical Oncology Knowledge Bases from Scientific Literature

mcp_server.note: The 22-tool MCP server is declared in tool_registry.build_civic_mcp_server() and provisioned by the Claude Agent SDK when CivicExtractionClient is constructed. To launch a standalone MCP server for external clients, call build_civic_mcp_server() from a small wrapper script — the server object is a stdio-capable SDK MCP server.

usage_examples.description: Run the full extraction pipeline on a single publication PDF.
usage_examples.outputs: results/{paper_id}_extraction.json — 45-field evidence-item array with verbatim quotes, confidence scores, and ontology identifiers.

usage_examples.description: Invoke the pipeline programmatically from another Python script.
usage_examples.invocation: from client import CivicExtractionClient; client = CivicExtractionClient(verbose=True); await client.run_extraction(paper_id='PMID_18528420')
